pkgmetadata.longdescription: portconf manages and cleans up /etc/portage configuration: sorts and deduplicates USE-flag and keyword entries, removes invalid or globally-defined flags, prunes not-found / not- installed atoms, manages timestamped backup tarballs of the config tree, detects and removes unused overlays + stale dep-cache, and regenerates the world file. Implemented as a single bash script; shells out to eix, qatom, qlist, agrep, emerge, and eselect. Originally written by megabaks (2012-2014); fork maintained by istitov since 2026.

use.flag: Install the bash-completion script for the app-shells/bash-completion framework.
Install the zsh completion function (_portconf) into app-shells/zsh's site-functions directory.
